intro.title:
The express
quote.
intro.lede: You know exactly what you want? Answer a few concrete questions about area and trades. We analyse them and send you an initial, solid cost estimate within 24 hours — without a long preliminary phone call.
intro.mediaAlt: A period building before renovation as the basis for an express quote

form.servicePromptGewerke: Which trades suit your project? (multiple choice)
form.servicePromptOther: Which service or detailed calculator suits your project?
form.serviceNote: No preselection is needed for special requests. Briefly describe your request in the next step.
form.scopeHeizungPlaceholder: e.g. 120 m², 8 radiators or 1 sauna heater
form.scopeAnderesPlaceholder: e.g. extend a bathroom, waterproof a balcony
form.summaryHint: This breakdown is carried over with your enquiry.
form.msgLabel: Special features / a short summary of your project
form.msgPlaceholder: Are there any special features, e.g. heritage protection, special requests or challenges? Describe them briefly here.
form.errorSubmit: Your enquiry could not be sent ({{error}}). Please try again or write to us directly at office@primavista-bauprojekte.com.
form.successBody: Your express enquiry has reached us. We'll assess your project and send you an initial cost estimate within <s>24 hours</s> — by email at <s>{{email}}</s>
form.successStep1: Site management checks the area or scope, location and requested services.
form.successStep2: You receive a written preliminary cost estimate.
form.successStep3: If you wish, we refine the quote on site — binding after a measure-up.
